basic_details.job_title: Government Polytechnic Narpala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Assistant, Lab Attender, Office Subordinate Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Assistant, Lab Attender, Office Subordinate
basic_details.short_information: Government Polytechnic Narpala has published the Junior Assistant, Lab Attender, and Office Subordinate Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 8 positions across various categories. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 42 years and holding qualifications such as a Bachelor's Degree, ITI Pass Certificate with 1 year experience, Diploma with 1 year experience, or VII Class pass with the ability to ride a bicycle are eligible to apply through offline mode. The application process is active and will remain open until 20-06-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree, ITI Pass Certificate with 1 year experience, Diploma with 1 year experience, VII Class examination pass and able to ride a Bicycle
qualification.details: Junior Assistant: Must hold a Bachelor’s Degree of any University in India established or incorporated by or under a Central Act, State Act or Provincial Act or an Institution recognized by the University Grants Commission or any equivalent qualification. Lab Attender (Mechanical): ITI Pass Certificate in related trades such as Fitter, Turner, Machinist, Welder or other equivalent Mechanical trades with 1 year of experience after ITI or A Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (DME) with 1 year of experience. Lab Attender (Electrical): ITI Pass Certificate in Electrician or related trades with 1 year of experience after ITI or A Diploma in Electrical & Electronics Engineering (DEEE) with 1 year of experience. Office Subordinate: Must have passed VII Class examination and Must be able to ride a Bicycle.

selection_process: Certificate Verification Skill Test Written Examination Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Government Polytechnic Narpala Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
